sentences: [{'sentence': 'Rocket Lab (RKLB +0.32%) is one of the clear-cut leaders in space technology.', 'label': 'positive', 'score': 0.006799786206101999, 'positive': 0.006799786206101999, 'negative': 0.005341510768630542, 'neutral': 99.98786449432373}, {'sentence': 'In fact, the company is second only to Space Exploration Technologies in providing rocket-launching services for third-party customers.', 'label': 'positive', 'score': 0.0055514086852781475, 'positive': 0.0055514086852781475, 'negative': 0.0053922765800962225, 'neutral': 99.98905658721924}, {'sentence': 'A recent acquisition move suggests that the company will be making more challenges to SpaceX in another category.', 'label': 'negative', 'score': 98.92721176147461, 'positive': 0.23855783510953188, 'negative': 98.92721176147461, 'neutral': 0.8342236280441284}, {'sentence': 'Rocket Lab recently announced that it had signed a deal to acquire Iridium Communications (IRDM 3.61%), a provider of satellite-based mobile communication services.', 'label': 'positive', 'score': 99.94938373565674, 'positive': 99.94938373565674, 'negative': 0.02812905586324632, 'neutral': 0.022486678790301085}, {'sentence': 'The space tech specialist is on track to pay $8 billion to acquire Iridium in a half-cash, half-stock deal.', 'label': 'positive', 'score': 0.5165617447346449, 'positive': 0.5165617447346449, 'negative': 0.013489312550518662, 'neutral': 99.4699478149414}]
